[ERROR] Tests run: 3, Failures: 1, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0, Time elapsed: 6.482 s <<< FAILURE! -- in io.crate.planner.ViewPlannerTest
[ERROR] io.crate.planner.ViewPlannerTest.test_push_filter_beyond_view_with_aliased_column -- Time elapsed: 0.721 s <<< FAILURE!
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 

Expecting actual:
  ["Rename[tableid, "unnest(arr)"] AS doc.v",
    "  └ Eval[field1 AS tableid, unnest(arr)]",
    "    └ Filter[(field1 AS tableid = 1)]",
    "      └ ProjectSet[unnest(arr), arr, field1 AS tableid]",
    "        └ Collect[doc.t1 | [arr, field1 AS tableid] | true]"]
to contain exactly (and in same order):
  ["Rename[tableid, "unnest(arr)"] AS doc.v",
    "  └ Eval[field1 AS tableid, unnest(arr)]",
    "    └ ProjectSet[unnest(arr), arr, field1 AS tableid]",
    "      └ Collect[doc.t1 | [arr, field1 AS tableid] | (field1 AS tableid = 1)]"]
but some elements were not found:
  ["    └ ProjectSet[unnest(arr), arr, field1 AS tableid]",
    "      └ Collect[doc.t1 | [arr, field1 AS tableid] | (field1 AS tableid = 1)]"]
and others were not expected:
  ["    └ Filter[(field1 AS tableid = 1)]",
